notes: Monetization is in. Google Play Billing is wired: the AI tutor (Learn tab) becomes a subscription with a free trial, and levels A2/B1/B2 unlock with a one-time purchase (A0/A1 stay free forever). The AI tutor now has a fair daily message limit so the subscription price stays sustainable. Prices come from the store per your region and include tax. Nothing about the free course changed — lessons, spaced-repetition review, quizzes and progress tracking remain free.
